---
title: "Net Zero 2023"
description: "Net Zero taught to undergrads."
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://julianbarg.github.io/public_documents/presentations/net_zero_JB_2023-03-14.pdf" width="100%" style="height:90vh; border:none;"></iframe>
```

Session on Net Zero for undergraduate students.
